oneOf.title: Provide information
oneOf.description: Missing information requested without re-issuing invoice.

oneOf.title: Issue new invoice
oneOf.description: Request to re-issue a corrected invoice.

oneOf.title: Credit fully
oneOf.description: Request to fully cancel the referenced invoice with a credit note.

oneOf.title: Credit partially
oneOf.description: Request to issue partial credit note for corrections only.

oneOf.title: Credit the amount
oneOf.description: Request to repay the amount paid on the invoice.

oneOf.title: Other
oneOf.description: Requested action is not defined by code.

key.title: Key
key.description: Key helps determine what to do next.

description.title: Description
description.description:
Description includes human readable details about what steps should be
taken next.

ext.title: Extensions
ext.description: Extensions for local or format focussed data

bill.Action.description: Action provides a suggestion about what to do next with the document.
